title: Evasive malloc failure in some instances
body:
Hi there!

In some hard-to-reproduce cases, some malloc assertion fails.

```
Vtop: malloc.c:2379: sysmalloc: Assertion `(old_top == initial_top (av) && old_size == 0) || ((unsigned long) (old_size) >= MINSIZE && prev_inuse (old_top) && ((unsigned long) old_end & (pagesize - 1)) == 0)' failed.
```

[Here is a repository with a Docker image to help you reproduce](https://github.com/flaviens/verilator-b2).

Interestingly, if I re-verilate the same sources, I do not systematically get the same error again.

I'm using `Verilator 5.018 2023-10-30 rev v5.004-74-g41e5f6b7d` on Ubuntu 22.04.

Thank you!
Flavien
code_blocks: Vtop: malloc.c:2379: sysmalloc: Assertion `(old_top == initial_top (av) && old_size == 0) || ((unsigned long) (old_size) >= MINSIZE && prev_inuse (old_top) && ((unsigned long) old_end & (pagesize - 1)) == 0)' failed.
